text:
Sophia loved to go hiking. One particularly scorching summer day, she decided to hike up Maple Crest. She loved the view. That hill was just breathtaking. She felt like royalty.

After hours of wandering around, she stopped at a little pond. That looked nice. She threw a stone. Nothing happened. She threw another. Nothing. She looked thoughtful.

Eventually something glided through the water. She put her nose there and breathed in. That smell! She leaned closer. It was beautiful.

She picked it up - a lovely foxflower. She put it in her pocket. She didn't want it. Maybe someone else would? She decided.

She wandered home. That evening, she sat quietly. The foxflower seemed peaceful. Maybe she should keep it?

She buried it beside her bed. Maybe next night.

She woke up. Something was digging.

She jumped.

A raccoon.

Into her quilt. Sophia chuckled.

That night she dreamed of talking raccoons. They
